text: - Hello. - Can I help you? - Hey, this is Chelsea. There's a note on your Medicare profile that your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed. Just a quick confirmation from you and we're all set. Do you have Part A and Part B? - Yeah. Far as I know I do. - Perfect. Let me connect you with the Medicare specialist from Iowa. - Hi. Thank you so much for holding on. My name is Sam. How are you doing today? - I'm doing fine. What's the true partnership in Medicare? - Well, this call is in regards to inquiry about Medicare new benefits. You do have Medicare Part A and B, right? - I believe so. - How old are you? - 81. - Okay. In the age of 81, are you getting any retirement plan or any health insurance through your previous job? - Well, that's none of your business on that one. - It's great. My business, sir. - No, no, no, no, no. - If there's none of my business, then you can leave the call, sir. - Okay. Goodbye.
